author: stephanie
body: Added the non-goals section so we stop relitigating the SQL editor every standup.

author: Megan Shaw
body: RBAC granularity is doable for GA but tight. Let's confirm Cobalt's exact requirement before we commit.

author: Ryan Iyer
body: Locked the Weekly Activated Accounts definition. Counter-metric p95 target is realistic given the new aggregation layer.

author: Carlos Rivera
body: Launch plan looks solid. Keep the pilot blockers risk front and center in the weekly readout.

author: stephanie
body: Moved launch comms to its own page so marketing can edit without touching the plan.

author: Aisha Bello
body: I'll draft the CS migration playbook off this charter. Need the final RBAC behavior first.

author: stephanie
body: Synthesis matches what I heard in the Meridian session — onboarding empty states are the recurring theme.

author: Tomoko Hayashi
body: On it — reworking the empty states with a data-free guided setup. Will link the Figma frames.

author: Megan Shaw
body: Materialized cohort tables are in. Hourly refresh holds the query budget with room to spare.

author: Ryan Iyer
body: Taxonomy migration done. Legacy events deprecated; dashboards now read the new names only.

author: Tomoko Hayashi
body: Builder and share modal are ready for review in Figma. Comparison overlay needs one more pass.

author: Carlos Rivera
body: Approved the scope cut. Read-only mobile is the right call to protect the ship date.

author: stephanie
body: Tied every active experiment back to the north-star metric. Dropped two that were chasing vanity numbers.

author: stephanie
body: Biggest drop-off is signup to first saved view. Guided setup should move the activation funnel.

author: stephanie
body: Comms draft ready for marketing after freeze. Holding the pilot quotes until they're approved.

author: Benjamin Morales
body: Pulled the success metrics into a table at the top — Weekly Activated Accounts is the one we report on.

author: Nathan Greene
body: Open question on permissions: do pilot admins get full edit, or read-only for their team's segments? Need Stephanie's call.

author: Lily Owens
body: Added the funnel-stage definitions so the drop-off report and the dashboard read the same numbers.

author: Layla Khan
body: Suggest we add a go/no-go gate at feature freeze on Oct 9 before the Nov 13 ship date locks.

author: Owen Jensen
body: Mapped each pilot — Brightpath, Arcadia, Meridian — to a launch milestone so we can track readiness per account.

author: megan
body: Added the non-goals section so we stop relitigating custom SQL every standup.

author: carlos
body: Locking WAA as the north-star. Please don't reopen raw actives in the QBR.

author: tomoko
body: Scope cut for GA: saved views + digests in, custom dashboards out. Fast-follow noted.

author: ryan
body: Pilot feedback synthesis: top ask across all three is scheduled exports.

author: stephanie
body: Freeze is Oct 9. Anything not merged rolls to fast-follow, no exceptions.

author: megan
body: Empty-state is the activation lever. Sample dataset ships this sprint.

author: carlos
body: Retention metric spec updated: WAA numerator excludes trialers.

author: tomoko
body: Event taxonomy: consolidating to dashboard_saved. Old names deprecated end of sprint.

author: ryan
body: Launch comms draft is ready for Carlos's review. Exec summary up top.

author: stephanie
body: Onboarding funnel test at 50%. Reading significance Friday, no early peeking.

author: megan
body: Mentorship program notes: pairing two early-career PMs with shadow reviews.

author: carlos
body: Growth experiment framework: every test needs a kill criterion before launch.

author: tomoko
body: Enterprise reporting charter: v1 is templated, not a query builder.

author: ryan
body: Pilot program charter updated with the renewal criteria and seat expansion path.

author: stephanie
body: Weekly status: perf work done, activation trending up, export exporter in review.
